title: BlackboardEntry.payload — repo.crawl.complete shape
description: JSON Schema for the payload JSONB column when entry_type='report' and subject='repo.crawl.complete'. Posted by RepoCrawlerWorker (src/will/workers/repo_crawler.py) via post_report() on a successful crawl cycle. The payload is the stats dict produced by CrawlOrchestrator.run_crawl() (src/body/services/crawl_service/orchestrator.py) plus a completed_at timestamp. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1; ADR-011; RepoCrawlerWorker is the sole emitter. This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

files_scanned.description: Number of repository files visited during the crawl pass.

files_changed.description: Number of files whose content changed relative to the prior crawl state.

symbols_linked.description: Number of symbol→symbol edges created or refreshed in the knowledge graph.

edges_created.description: Number of new graph edges created in this crawl cycle.

chunks_upserted.description: Number of file-chunk vectors upserted into the Qdrant collection.

verdicts_purged.description: Number of stale verdicts purged from the knowledge store during this cycle.

orphans_reaped.description: Number of orphan DB rows deleted. Zero when the coherence guard tripped (see coherence_guard field).

coherence_guard.description: Present when the orphan-reap coherence guard fired. Records the guard state rather than performing the DELETE. Mutually exclusive with orphans_reaped > 0.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp marking the end of the crawl cycle, as produced by datetime.now(UTC).isoformat().
